caption: The video depicts a panel discussion taking place in a conference room. Three individuals, two men and one woman, are standing behind individual podiums equipped with microphones and water bottles. The setting appears formal, with a banner in the background that includes text related to science, practice, and healthcare questions. The participants seem engaged in their discussion, with one man on the left gesturing as if explaining a point, the woman in the center listening attentively, and the other man on the right appearing to be in thought or preparing to speak. The audience is seated in rows of chairs facing the panel, suggesting an organized event aimed at sharing knowledge or insights on a specific topic.
